items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for 'Fill rate by time slot'.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the 'Fill rate by time slot' requirement, but the provided evidence does not include any specific data or metrics that demonstrate this fill rate. While there are insights into booking performance and customer behavior, there is no direct evidence or analysis related to the fill rate by specific time slots. This lack of concrete data prevents a definitive conclusion about whether the requirement is satisfied or not.
